brand-story-img.query: Jewelry That Feels Like Home Velmora was born from a simple belief: luxury should feel personal, not performative. Each piece is designed in our New York studio, then cast and finished by artisans who share our obsession with detail. We use 18K gold plating on hypoallergenic bases — so you can wear your favorites every day, without the worry.
